mapper.select: SELECT id, operation, enabled, description, url, method, headers, request_body, updated_at FROM mock_api_config ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mock_api_config(operation, enabled, description, url, method, headers, request_body, updated_at) VALUES( #{operation}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{url}, #{method}, #{headers, typeHandler=com.example.mallcs.typehandler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{requestBody}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT(operation) DO UPDATE SET enabled = EXCLUDED.enabled, description = EXCLUDED.description, url = EXCLUDED.url, method = EXCLUDED.method, headers = EXCLUDED.headers, request_body = EXCLUDED.request_body, updated_at = NOW()
